tasks.instruction: Find a full-day preschool program for a 3-year-old that ends at or after 5:30 pm, costs at most $1,100 per month, includes meals and late pickup, and then start an online enrollment request for your child in that program.

tasks.instruction: In the tour scheduler, book the earliest available tour on a Tuesday in the next calendar month that starts between 9:00 am and 11:00 am, and submit the booking form with the provided parent contact details as an in-person tour.

tasks.instruction: Filter classrooms to Pre-K, compare the first two shown, and apply for the one that has the lower student-to-teacher ratio while keeping monthly tuition under $1,300, breaking any ties by choosing the one with lower tuition.

tasks.instruction: Using the weekly schedule planner for a 2-year-old, choose a combination of full-day and half-day options across Monday through Friday so the total weekly hours are between 35 and 40 and the weekly cost is under $400, then submit a schedule request with your contact info and desired start date.
